PHYS261, PHYS270, PHYS271 (14 credits)

2 For students with experience with computer programming this course can be replaced by PHYS474 Computational Physics or ASTR415 Computational Astrophysics. If students complete ASTR415 for this requirement, it cannot be counted as an advanced astronomy course (400-level course) requirement.

3 Completion of both MATH246 and either MATH240 or MATH461 will be

accepted in place of PHYS274.

Grades in all of the above required courses must be “C-” or better.
